title: Agrocity — Mobile App
description: Android application for managing urban gardens with AI-powered crop and pest diagnosis. Built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, following MVVM architecture. Communicates with a custom REST API backend and integrates Google Gemini for real-time image analysis.

title: Agrocity — Backend API
description: RESTful API built with C# .NET Core to power the Agrocity mobile app. Handles crop management, user authentication, and real-time push notifications via Firebase Cloud Messaging. Backed by a relational SQL Server database with an optimized schema.

title: Pregnancy Assistant App
description: Cross-platform mobile app built for pregnant women, offering real-time chat, appointment reminders, community posts, and an AI-powered question assistant. Features geolocation-based clinic maps and full offline support.

title: Employee Management System
description: Desktop application developed for Icosoft featuring fingerprint reader integration for attendance tracking. Covers employee management, schedules, roles, and permission profiles. Built following Scrum methodology from requirements gathering to delivery.

title: Task Service
description: Microservice for task management built in Java with Spring Boot. Exposes a clean REST API following service-oriented architecture principles.

title: S3 Log Manager
description: Web app for saving and listing logs in a simulated S3 bucket using LocalStack. Demonstrates local AWS cloud integration with Node.js and Docker.

title: Data Analyst Projects
description: Collection of data analysis projects covering data cleaning, exploratory analysis, visualization, and insight extraction using Python and Pandas.
